positive: A vibrant, psychedelic abstract pattern featuring interlocking mandalas and stylized cosmic elements. The colors should be intensely saturated, utilizing gradients and optical illusion effects. The composition must be seamless and repeatable, suitable for all-over printing. Art Nouveau influence, high complexity.
negative: ugly, deformed, blurry, low quality, watermark, text, bad anatomy, extra limbs, duplicate elements, solid blocks of color, realism, simplicity
